final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand color palette and typography specification sheet for 染秋 (RAN QIU), an autumn fragrance brand rooted in Eastern philosophy and traditional Chinese dyeing aesthetics.

Style/medium: needs a refined brand-guidelines / style-guide aesthetic — exact layout execution is yours
Composition: must include primary color swatches, secondary/accent color swatches, and typography specimen sections clearly separated
Subject: must include:
  Brand identity: 染秋 (RAN QIU) — autumn fragrance brand
  Color system: primary palette + supporting palette derived from autumn botanicals and Eastern spices (桂花, 柿子, 枫叶, 乌龙茶, 肉桂, 檀香, 琥珀)
  Typography specimen: Chinese and Latin typeface pairings that reflect 东方哲学 elegance and poetic restraint
  Core fragrance lines referenced as color/mood anchors: 桂花乌龙 / 琥珀枫叶 / 柿霜暮色
Scene/backdrop: needs a minimal brand-sheet backdrop — exact surface treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, meditative autumn atmosphere — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: needs a direction rooted in deep autumnal tones — warm ochres, burnt oranges, muted persimmon, moss, amber, smoky sandalwood — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a subtle texture evoking traditional 染 (dyeing) craft — exact grain and surface weight are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋", "RAN QIU", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色", "Primary", "Secondary"
Constraints: must preserve the brand philosophy of 东方哲学 and 染 craft aesthetics throughout the visual language; all color swatches must be labeled; typography specimens must show both Chinese and Latin glyphs
Avoid: overly bright or saturated Western color palettes; generic mood-board collage style; cold or blue-toned color directions
